query:
INSERT INTO
                        deal_sli_piece_results (
                            run_id,
                            deal_id,
                            piece_index,
                            piece_cid,
                            url_tested,
                            success,
                            content_length,
                            is_valid_car,
                            result_code,
                            tested_at
                        )
                   VALUES
                        ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $9, NOW())
